channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rosendale Road SE21 between Thurlow Park Road and, 23rd May
item.description:
Rosendale Road SE21 between Thurlow Park Road and Lovelace Road junctions there must be at least a dozen trees which have lots of ground level trunk growth which is narrowing the footpath and growing into the cycle lane. (Also aid concealment re crime.) Please inspect and take appropriate action. Picture of example attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rosendale Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/S 91 by wall on brondesbury villas, 23rd May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Flytipping on long walk, 23rd May
item.description:
Dumped rubbish, bath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Walk, Woolwich

item.title: Half of drain cover missing, 23rd May
item.description:
Looks like its fallen in. Hole about 40cm at widest point. In middle of nearside lane.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruckholt Road, Hackney, London

item.description:

item.title: Medical Waste in driveway and street, 23rd May
item.description:
Gloves, aprons, masks and other medical rubbish strewn over garden. Attracting rats and other vermin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt public bin, 23rd May
item.description:
A melted public bin by the bus stop. Broken glass and melted plastic all over the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping residential trash on street, 23rd May
item.description:
This is happening daily and has been reported several times before, can you please find out who’s doing it? It’s happening every single day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flat 60-70 Blossom Court Bin room, 23rd May
item.description:
We found the graffiti in bin room at Blossom Court please fix it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sumner Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canister left on Oakwood Avenue near Bromley Road, 23rd May
item.description:
My husband was doing some litter picking this morning and found this large canister together with balloons and other paraphernalia. He cleared the other stuff but was not sure what to do with the canister so left it by the wall. It was still there this evening.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge Freezer fly tipped, 23rd May
item.description:
Fridge freezer left by bins at end of Pickworth Close Please can this be removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickworth Close, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to the street sign, 23rd May
item.description:
House hold and DIY waste dumped on the street. Here is a video of the culprits walking out of their flat and dumping it in the street. Https://ring.com/share/6d3e88ec-e9ce-4d2d-8c68-c2ab9a2c6e44

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Forest bikes abandoned on Delafield Road pavement obstruxting entrance to Charlton station, 23rd May
item.description:
4 Forest bikes just left flat over pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delafield Road, Charlton
